entries.round: task:The user wants the Whale Tracker to show Polymarket-specific metrics (number of Polymarket trades, Win rate, Profit, Loss) instead of just raw Polygonscan transaction counts. 1. Refactor 'services/polygonscan.py' into 'services/wallet_profiler.py'. 2. Instead of Polygonscan, use Polymarket's internal Gamma API (e.g., https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/leaderboard or users profile API) or Polymarket Subgraph endpoints to fetch a wallet's real PnL, Win/Loss, and total volume. 3. Update the CLOB listener and aiogram message template to display these new metrics (Win, Loss, Profit, Polymarket Txns). 4. Update 'tasks.md' and 'spec.md' to reflect this shift from Polygonscan to Polymarket Native User Analytics. Use <write_file>.
